title: Expose first-class grip MCP surface
goal: Expose grip_list and grip_run or equivalent MCP tools over a small allowlisted set of intent-shaped, receipt-bound Grabowski runners.

acceptance.assertion: grip_list returns name, purpose, target, scope, effect class, risk, recovery path, preconditions and expected receipt shape for each allowed grip.
grip_run dispatches only an explicit allowlist of narrow runners and rejects unknown or broad do-everything grips.
Every mutating grip either emits or links a receipt with target, scope and outcome.
Grip availability is visible for the current session/profile, even if enforcement remains conservative.
Focused tests cover list output, rejected unknown grips, read-only grips and receipt-bound mutation dispatch.

metadata.non_goal: Does not add generic shell or Captain default execution.
